Class PowerUp

java.lang.Object
game.GameEntity
game.PowerUps.PowerUp
Direct Known Subclasses:
Cooldown, Engine, Life, Shield
public abstract class PowerUp extends GameEntity
Abstract base class for powerups. Handles movement, activation, and effects.

  • Constructor Details

    • PowerUp

      public PowerUp(Properties gameProps, double x, String type, int wave, int index)
      Constructs a powerup using game properties
      Parameters:
      gameProps - loaded game properties file
      x - initial x-coordinate
      type - powerup type string
      wave - wave number containing the power-up
      index - index of the power-up in the wave

  • Method Details

    • update

      public void update(double actualSpeed)
      Updates the powerup movement and duration.
      Specified by:
      update in class GameEntity
      Parameters:
      actualSpeed - speed scaling factor

    • draw

      public void draw()
      Draws the powerup if it has arrived and is active
      Overrides:
      draw in class GameEntity

    • isOffScreen

      public boolean isOffScreen()
      Checks whether the powerup has gone below screen.
      Returns:
      true if off-screen

    • markCollected

      public void markCollected()
      Marks the powerup as collected and starts its duration timer

    • isActive

      public boolean isActive()

    • create

      public static PowerUp create(Properties gameProps, int wave, int index)
      Creates a powerup instance
      Parameters:
      gameProps - loaded properties file
      wave - wave number
      index - power-up index within the wave
      Returns:
      created powerup instance

    • applyEffect

      public abstract void applyEffect(PlayerShip playerShip)
      Applies the powerup effect to the player ship.
      Parameters:
      playerShip - player ship receiving the effect

    • removeEffect

      public abstract void removeEffect(PlayerShip playerShip)
      Removes the powerup effect from the player ship.
      Parameters:
      playerShip - player ship losing the effect

    • getDuration

      protected int getDuration()
